_readme: Placeholder MCP server templates for ESCC. THESE ARE TEMPLATES — copy the entries you need into your own Claude Code config (.mcp.json at the project root, or ~/.claude.json) and replace every ${PLACEHOLDER}. Never commit real credentials; ESCC keeps only placeholders here.

PREFERRED PATH: Gmail, Google Calendar, and HubSpot are best connected via claude.ai Connectors (Settings -> Connectors), which need no entry in this file. The 'gmail' / 'google-calendar' / 'hubspot' stdio templates below are only for teams that self-host those MCP servers instead.
Package names below (e.g. @your-org/*-mcp-server) are illustrative placeholders — substitute the real server package or remote URL for your stack.
MCP BUDGET (see rules/common/security.md): keep <= 10 enabled servers and < 80 active tools. Enable only what a persona needs; disable the rest with ESCC_DISABLED_MCPS.

LinkedIn: there is NO official LinkedIn API or supported MCP server. ESCC documents manual / browser-driven research patterns instead — do not wire an unofficial scraper here (see rules/common/data-handling.md: no ToS-violating scraping).
